tools.name: search_vector_store
tools.description: Searches the PDF document for relevant information. Use this for any factual questions about the uploaded files.

query.description: The search query to look up in the document.

tools.name: cleanup_session_data
tools.description: Deletes all stored chunks and session data for the current user. Use this only if the user explicitly asks to 'reset', 'clear', or 'delete' their data.
